breaking.title: Pakistan says carried out strikes along Afghanistan border, 29 militants killed
breaking.summary: The strikes against the hideouts and safe havens of terrorists came in after a paramilitary Rangers headquarters in Karachi on Saturday (June 27, 2026) was attacked by militants, Information Minister Atta Tarar said

breaking.title: Violence erupts at Thiruvananthapuram Corporation meeting as BJP councillor attacks Congress leader K.S. Sabarinadhan amid protests
breaking.summary: Council meeting began amid tensions as Opposition LDF and UDF mounted protests against continuance of BJP councillor R. Sugathan arrested under KAAPA and lodged at Viyyur prison. Two women Congress councillors too were allegedly attacked

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran says no technical meeting expected with U.S. in coming days
breaking.summary: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian said that $6 billion in frozen Iranian assets would be released by Qatar as negotiations with the United States were challenged by attacks across the Persian Gulf

breaking.title: Inside Indian Delegation That Will Visit Iran For Supreme Leader's Funeral
breaking.summary: Ali Khamenei was killed in US and Israeli strikes on February 28

breaking.title: Pakistani airstrikes kill 36 civilians in Afghanistan and wound 160, say officials
breaking.summary: Pakistani security forces carried out a ground operation along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border, followed by strikes against militant hideouts and safe havens, killing 29 fighters

breaking.title: Goldman backs India 30-year bonds as Iran war impact contained
breaking.summary: Goldman Sachs has recommended buying India's 30-year government bonds, citing easing inflation expectations, lower oil prices and reduced fiscal risks after the US-Iran ceasefire. The brokerage believes the long end of the bond curve offers better value as shorter-term bonds have already rallied.

breaking.title: Israel Approves Proposal To Recognise World War I Armenian Genocide
breaking.summary: Historians estimate that upto 1.5 million Armenians were killed by Ottoman Turks

breaking.title: Temperatures to drop this week but relief from heat may be short-lived
breaking.summary: Many will experience cooler air and some rain this week before a possible return to hot weather at the weekend.
